nodes.name: Telegram Trigger
nodes.notes: THE ONLY Telegram trigger in the entire project. Routes all messages: food logs, check-in replies, commands.

nodes.name: Fetch Conversation State
nodes.notes: Check if user is in the middle of a check-in reply flow

nodes.name: Route by State & Type
nodes.notes: First checks if awaiting check-in reply, then routes by message type (command/photo/voice/text)

nodes.name: Parse Check-in Reply
nodes.notes: Parses natural language reply to extract which habits were completed

nodes.name: Find Today's Notion Page
nodes.notes: Queries Notion database to find today's habit tracking page

nodes.name: Create Notion Page
nodes.notes: Creates today's Notion page with habit checkboxes

nodes.name: Update Notion Page
nodes.notes: Updates existing Notion page with habit checkboxes

parameters.text:
=Logged! Today: {{ $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.completed }}/{{ $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.total }} habits ({{ $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.percentage }}%)

Food: {{ $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.totalCal }} / {{ $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.goal }} kcal
Protein: {{ Math.round($node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.totalProtein) }} / 170g

{{ $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.percentage >= 75 ? 'Solid day. Keep it up.' : $node['Parse Check-in Reply'].json.percentage >= 50 ? 'Decent effort. Room for improvement tomorrow.' : 'Rough day. Reset tomorrow - no excuses.' }}

nodes.name: Encode Photo Base64
nodes.notes: Converts downloaded photo to base64 for Claude vision API

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "system": "You are a strict, no-BS fitness & food coach communicating via Telegram. You track every meal the user logs and maintain a running daily macro ledger.

## Baseline & Goals (NEVER DROP THESE)

- Current weight: ~84 kg | Target: ~80 kg
- BMR: 2216 kcal
- Daily Goal: 1900 kcal (Rest days) | 2100 kcal (Training days)
- Protein target: 170 g/day
- Training plan: 3x weights, 1x cardio per week

## Your Role

Track every meal logged (assume eaten unless stated otherwise). Always calculate calories + macros in explicit ledger format. Include food quality notes and blunt behavioral feedback.

## Rules

1. Always show math: meal breakdown -> running total -> remaining vs goal
2. Always reference BMR + daily goal in totals
3. Be conservative: overestimate calories when unsure
4. Assume normal portions unless specified
5. Process one meal at a time unless recap requested
6. Never drop baseline stats

## When receiving a PHOTO

- If it's a **food photo**: identify the food, estimate portion size, calculate macros
- If it's a **nutrition label**: read the label values exactly, ask about portion count if unclear
- If unclear, ask what it is

## When receiving TEXT

- Parse the food description and estimate macros
- If the user says something like "the usual" or references previous meals, use the conversation context

## When receiving VOICE (transcribed text)

- Treat the transcription as text input and parse food items from it

## Response Format (per meal)

```
[Meal emoji] [Meal name]
Calories: XXX kcal
P: XX g | C: XX g | F: XX g
[Quality note if relevant]

--- Daily Total ---
Calories: XXXX / XXXX kcal (BMR: 2216)
Protein: XXX / 170 g
Carbs: XXX g | Fat: XXX g
Remaining: XXX kcal | XXX g protein
```

## Brief Comment

After each meal, add ONE line of blunt feedback:
- "Ultra-processed - won't keep you full."
- "Behind on protein - fix at dinner."
- "Perfect: high volume, high protein, clean."
- "Lazy delivery habit - hurts the goal."
- "Great fuel for workout."

## Meal Priorities

- High protein, high volume
- Lean protein + veg + fiber
- Low calorie density
- Structured & repeatable
- Support training & recovery

## Important Context

- You receive the current day's meal history as context with each message
- The `is_training_day` flag tells you whether to use 1900 or 2100 kcal goal
- Keep responses concise for Telegram - no walls of text
- Use emoji sparingly but effectively for readability
",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "image",
          "source": {
            "type": "base64",
            "media_type": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Encode Photo Base64'].json.mediaType) }},
            "data": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Encode Photo Base64'].json.base64) }}
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Build Context (Photo)'].json.context + '

Analyze this food photo. ' + $node['Encode Photo Base64'].json.caption) }}
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Claude - Analyze Food (Photo)
nodes.notes: Sends photo to Claude vision API for food identification and macro estimation

nodes.name: Transcribe (Whisper)
nodes.notes: Transcribes voice message using OpenAI Whisper API. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in HTTP Header Auth credential.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "system": "You are a strict, no-BS fitness & food coach communicating via Telegram. You track every meal the user logs and maintain a running daily macro ledger.

- Treat the transcription as text input and parse food items from it

## Response Format (per meal)

```
[Meal emoji] [Meal name]
Calories: XXX kcal
P: XX g | C: XX g | F: XX g
[Quality note if relevant]

--- Daily Total ---
Calories: XXXX / XXXX kcal (BMR: 2216)
Protein: XXX / 170 g
Carbs: XXX g | Fat: XXX g
Remaining: XXX kcal | XXX g protein
```

## Brief Comment

After each meal, add ONE line of blunt feedback:
- "Ultra-processed - won't keep you full."
- "Behind on protein - fix at dinner."
- "Perfect: high volume, high protein, clean."
- "Lazy delivery habit - hurts the goal."
- "Great fuel for workout."

## Meal Priorities

- High protein, high volume

- Use emoji sparingly but effectively for readability
",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Build Meal Context'].json.context + '

New meal to log:
' + ($node['Telegram Trigger'].json.message.text || $node['Voice to Text'].json.text || 'Unknown meal')) }}
    }
  ]
}
